microphones.name: Peluso P-67
microphones.notes: Large diaphragm tube-style condenser. Flagship vocal mic.

microphones.name: AEA R88 mkII
microphones.phantomWarning: Do NOT send phantom power — ribbon element can be destroyed.
microphones.notes: Stereo ribbon mic. Produces figure-8 pattern from each element. Great for room, drum overhead, piano.

microphones.name: Telefunken AK47 mk I
microphones.notes: Large diaphragm tube condenser.

microphones.name: AKG C414 XLII
microphones.notes: Multi-pattern large diaphragm condenser. Versatile — vocals, overheads, acoustic instruments.

microphones.name: Beyerdynamic M160 (vintage)
microphones.phantomWarning: Do NOT send phantom power — ribbon element can be destroyed.
microphones.notes: Vintage hypercardioid ribbon. Great on guitar cabs, brass, strings.

microphones.name: Sennheiser 421 U5 #1 (vintage)
microphones.notes: Vintage dynamic. Classic on toms, guitar cabs, vocals, broadcast.

microphones.name: Sennheiser 421 U5 #2 (vintage)
microphones.notes: Vintage dynamic. Classic on toms, guitar cabs, vocals, broadcast.

microphones.name: Warm Audio WA-84 (Left)
microphones.notes: Stereo pair — left mic. Small diaphragm condenser (Neumann KM84-style). Great for overheads, acoustic guitar, hi-hat.

microphones.name: Warm Audio WA-84 (Right)
microphones.notes: Stereo pair — right mic. Small diaphragm condenser (Neumann KM84-style). Great for overheads, acoustic guitar, hi-hat.

microphones.name: Audio Technica AT4047/SV
microphones.notes: Large diaphragm condenser. Smooth, warm character. Vocals, voiceover, acoustic instruments.

microphones.name: Telefunken M82
microphones.notes: Large diaphragm dynamic. Designed for kick drum. Built-in EQ switches for different characters.

microphones.name: Beyerdynamic M88 TG
microphones.notes: Dynamic mic. Versatile — kick drum, bass cab, vocals.

microphones.name: Beyerdynamic M201 TG
microphones.notes: Hypercardioid dynamic. Excellent rejection. Snare, toms, guitar cabs.

microphones.name: sE VR2 Active
microphones.notes: Active ribbon mic — requires phantom power (unlike passive ribbons). Safe to send phantom. Smooth, detailed high end.

microphones.name: Audio Technica ATM450
microphones.notes: Small diaphragm condenser. Side-address design. Overheads, hi-hat, acoustic guitar.

microphones.name: Shure SM7B
microphones.notes: Dynamic broadcast mic. Great on vocals, guitar cabs. Benefits from Cloud Lifter or high-gain preamp.

microphones.name: Shure Beta 91A
microphones.notes: Boundary condenser. Designed to sit inside a kick drum on a pillow. Half-cardioid pattern.

microphones.name: Shure SM57 #1
microphones.notes: Industry standard dynamic. Snare, guitar cabs, toms, instruments.

microphones.name: Shure SM57 #2
microphones.notes: Industry standard dynamic. Snare, guitar cabs, toms, instruments.

microphones.name: Shure SM58 #1
microphones.notes: Industry standard vocal dynamic.

microphones.name: Shure SM58 #2
microphones.notes: Industry standard vocal dynamic.

preamps.name: Seventh Circle Audio CH01 — N72 modules
preamps.notes: 4x N72 Neve-style modules in the CH01 chassis. Channels 1-4. Classic warm, thick character.

preamps.name: Seventh Circle Audio CH01 — A12 modules
preamps.notes: 2x A12 API-style modules in the CH01 chassis. Channels 5-6. Punchy, forward midrange. Great on drums and guitars.

preamps.name: Seventh Circle Audio CH01 — C84 modules
preamps.notes: 2x C84 Millennia-style modules in the CH01 chassis. Very clean, transparent. Exact channel position in chassis unclear.

preamps.name: A Designs Pacifica
preamps.notes: Channels 7-8. Clean and detailed with a musical character.

preamps.name: AEA RPQ2
preamps.notes: Channels 9-10. Currently out for repair. High-gain preamp designed specifically for ribbon mics. No phantom power.

preamps.name: Sebatron VMP-2000e
preamps.notes: Channels 11-12. Beautiful on vocals. Has 30dB of built-in pad. Left off by default due to barely audible tube hum when powered on.

preamps.name: Sytek MPX-4A
preamps.notes: Channels 13-16. Connected via wall panel in live room (not through the snake). Very clean, transformer-less design. Not meant for saturation.

preamps.name: FMR RNP
preamps.notes: Used for the talkback mic. Always connected. Phantom power must be enabled for talkback to work.

converters.name: Metric Halo LIO-8 3D +DSP #1
converters.notes: Primary converter. 16 channels analog I/O. 3D processing with onboard DSP.

converters.name: Metric Halo LIO-8 3D +DSP #2
converters.notes: Secondary converter. 16 channels analog I/O. 3D processing with onboard DSP.

converters.name: Behringer Ultramatch Pro SRC24/96
converters.notes: Used for scratch and talkback only. Not part of the main signal chain.

converters.name: iConnectivity mioXL
converters.notes: MIDI routing hub for synths, drum machines, and controllers.

monitoring.name: Genelec 8341a "The Ones" (pair)
monitoring.notes: Three-way coaxial point-source monitors with GLM 4 room calibration. Power buttons are behind the mounting brackets — tricky to reach. Same spot on both sides (not mirrored). Always turn on LAST, off FIRST.

monitoring.name: Sennheiser HD600
monitoring.notes: Reference open-back headphones. For critical listening and mixing.

monitoring.name: Presonus HP-60
monitoring.notes: Always plugged in. 4 headphone outputs, each with volume control. Has blend knob between Cue Mix A and Cue Mix B.

monitoring.name: MYO Console
monitoring.notes: Latency-free monitoring with 64-bit summing. Split monitoring: signal goes to DAW and monitors simultaneously. Has templates for common setups.

monitoring.name: Euphonics Controller
monitoring.notes: Soft power button is tucked behind the mounting bracket. Does not power on with the main power conditioner — needs individual power-on.

synths.name: Roland Juno-60 (Minerva mod)
synths.notes: Classic analog polysynth with Minerva MIDI retrofit mod.

synths.name: Sequential Prophet '08
synths.notes: 8-voice analog polysynth. Line-level output, loud enough to bypass preamp and go straight to A/D.

synths.name: Yamaha SY77
synths.notes: FM synthesis + sample-based AWM. Emits high-frequency noise when powered on. Left off by default — only turn on when needed.

synths.name: Novation Bass Station II
synths.notes: 25-key analog monosynth. Great for bass lines and leads.

synths.name: Casio SK-5 (MIDI mod)
synths.notes: Lo-fi sampler keyboard with MIDI mod retrofit.

synths.name: Oberheim Matrix 1000
synths.notes: 6-voice analog rack synth. 1000 factory presets. No keyboard — must be triggered via MIDI from another synth or controller. Mechanical noise when on. Left off by default.

synths.name: Korg Poly800
synths.notes: 8-voice polysynth with DCOs and analog filter.

synths.name: Waldorf MicroQ
synths.notes: Desktop/rack virtual analog synth. No keyboard — trigger via MIDI.

synths.name: Fender Rhodes 88 mk II
synths.notes: 88-key electromechanical piano. Tine-based sound. Classic Rhodes tone.

synths.name: Yamaha U1 Acoustic Piano
synths.notes: Acoustic upright piano. Mic placement required for recording.

synths.name: Hammond A100 Organ + Leslie 251 Rotary Speaker
synths.notes: Tonewheel organ with matching Leslie 251 rotary cabinet. Leslie is on wheels — can drag into position. Great for organ and guitar effects.

synths.name: Elka Panther 300 Combo Organ
synths.notes: Italian combo organ. Vintage transistor sound.

drums_and_machines.name: Roland R8
drums_and_machines.notes: Sample-based drum machine with individual outputs.

drums_and_machines.name: Roland TR-707
drums_and_machines.notes: Classic digital drum machine. Individual outputs.

drums_and_machines.name: Mode Machines XOXBOX
drums_and_machines.notes: TB-303 clone with built-in sequencer. Acid bass lines.

guitars_and_amps.name: Vox AC30 Handwired
guitars_and_amps.notes: 30W handwired all-tube combo. Classic British chime and crunch.

guitars_and_amps.name: Fender Twin Reverb (silverface)
guitars_and_amps.notes: Silverface era. Clean headroom for days. Built-in reverb and tremolo.

guitars_and_amps.name: Fender Vibrolux (brownface)
guitars_and_amps.notes: Brownface era. Warm, round character with vibrato circuit.

guitars_and_amps.name: Dr. Z Maz 38
guitars_and_amps.notes: 38W all-tube. EL84 power section. Responsive to picking dynamics.

guitars_and_amps.name: Valco Sportsman
guitars_and_amps.notes: Vintage Valco combo. Raw, lo-fi character.

guitars_and_amps.name: Roland JC-120
guitars_and_amps.notes: Solid-state stereo combo. Pristine cleans with built-in chorus.

guitars_and_amps.name: Toetags Electronics 5F1 Champ
guitars_and_amps.notes: Handbuilt 5F1 Champ circuit. Low-wattage tube amp. Great for recording at manageable volumes.

guitars_and_amps.name: Fender '65 Jazzmaster AVRI with Lollar Pickups
guitars_and_amps.notes: American Vintage Reissue Jazzmaster with aftermarket Lollar pickups.

guitars_and_amps.name: Fender Mustang 1966
guitars_and_amps.notes: Original 1966 Fender Mustang. Vintage — handle with care.

guitars_and_amps.name: G&L ASAT Custom
guitars_and_amps.notes: Telecaster-style guitar with G&L MFD pickups.

guitars_and_amps.name: Pedal collection
guitars_and_amps.notes: Extensive pedal collection from Strymon, Empress, Chase Bliss, ZVEX, Pigtronix, Moog, Dr. Scientist, EHX, EQD, Blackout Effectors, Toetags Electronics and more.

outboard.name: Little Labs Inline Fader Bank
outboard.notes: Inline after channels 1-8, between preamp outputs and A/D inputs. Pads signal to prevent converter clipping when driving preamps hard.

software.name: M1 Mac Mini
software.notes: Studio computer. Runs all DAWs and plugins.

software.name: Pro Tools Studio
software.notes: Primary DAW for tracking and mixing.

software.name: Logic Pro
software.notes: Apple DAW. Full suite of virtual instruments and effects.

software.name: Ableton Live 12 Suite
software.notes: Electronic production, live performance, session-based workflow.

software.name: UAD Octo PCIe
software.notes: UAD DSP card with extensive plugin library. Hardware-accelerated processing.

software.name: FabFilter Pro Bundle
software.notes: Includes Pro-Q, Pro-C, Pro-L, Pro-R, Pro-MB, Pro-DS, etc.

software.name: Soundtoys 5 Bundle
software.notes: Creative effects — Decapitator, EchoBoy, PrimalTap, Crystallizer, etc.

software.name: iZotope RX 9
software.notes: Noise reduction, spectral editing, audio restoration.

rehearsal_pa.name: Allen & Heath MixWizard3 16:2
rehearsal_pa.notes: 16-channel analog mixer for the rehearsal PA system.

rehearsal_pa.name: JBL PRX712 #1
rehearsal_pa.notes: 12" powered PA main. Part of the rehearsal PA system.

rehearsal_pa.name: JBL PRX712 #2
rehearsal_pa.notes: 12" powered PA main. Part of the rehearsal PA system.

rehearsal_pa.name: Alto TX208 #1
rehearsal_pa.notes: 8" powered speaker used as monitor or fill.

rehearsal_pa.name: Alto TX208 #2
rehearsal_pa.notes: 8" powered speaker used as monitor or fill.

rehearsal_pa.name: Klark Teknik DN360
rehearsal_pa.notes: Dual-channel 1/3-octave graphic EQ for PA tuning.

rehearsal_pa.name: Klark Teknik DN504
rehearsal_pa.notes: 4-channel compressor/limiter for PA protection and dynamics.

rehearsal_pa.name: TC Electronic M-One XL
rehearsal_pa.notes: Dual-engine effects processor. Reverb and delay for rehearsal PA.

accessories.name: Cloud Lifters
accessories.notes: Clean gain boost for dynamic and ribbon mics. Requires phantom power from preamp to operate (phantom does not pass through to the mic).

accessories.name: DI Boxes
accessories.notes: For connecting guitars, bass, keyboards to preamp inputs.

accessories.name: Expression Pedals
accessories.notes: For use with synths and effects.

accessories.name: Extra Headphone Amps
accessories.notes: Additional headphone amps if the HP-60 doesn't have enough outputs.
